nodes.title: Why Television Award Shows Are No Longer a Safe Bet for Advertisers
PM Group Sister Company, Quarter Moon Productions, Takes Home Three ADDYs
OMG!  The Internet Still Hasn’t Killed TV!

pageContext.content:
The PM Group recently helped long-time friend, NewTek with production of materials for their part in the 2014 NAB Show in Las Vegas.
 
The NAB Show is the world’s largest electronic media show covering filmed entertainment and the development, management and delivery of content across all mediums. NewTek is one of more than 93,000 Attendees from 156 countries and 1,550+ Exhibitors. NAB Show is billed as “the ultimate marketplace for digital media and entertainment.”
 
NewTek Creative Director, Marion DeWall, said this about the work the PM Group did for her company. “When NewTek needed to work with an outside agency, I turned to the creative team I could trust—The PM Group. They are top-performers, fast, accurate, and can be trusted not only to do the job exactly right—but to “plus” the creative, and execute with pixel perfection. They are amazing.”
NewTek is an industry leader at making it easy and cost-effective for anyone to produce quality television content. Whether it’s live production and streaming, slow motion and instant replay, motion graphics and visual effects, NewTek makes a range of tools to help get the job done. Their three leading products are:  TriCaster – All-in-one, integrated live production system that offers the power of a live network studio. 3Play – Slow motion and instant replay system for sports producers at all levels. LightWave 3D – Industry-leading 3D animation and visual effects software used by artists working in television, feature and short film, architecture and design, games and print.
NewTek has plans to use The PM Group for several print production assignments in the near future.
